allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels -TimeoutSec 5; $r.tunnels | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.proto\) -> $\($_.public_url\) => $\($_.config.addr\)" } } catch { "ERROR querying ngrok API: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels -TimeoutSec 5; $r.tunnels | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.proto\) -> $\($_.public_url\) => $\($_.config.addr\)" } } catch { "ERROR querying ngrok API: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels -TimeoutSec 5; $r.tunnels | ForEach-Object { $_.public_url } } catch { "ngrok no está corriendo" })

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.database import SessionLocal; from app.models import MockClient; db = SessionLocal\(\); [print\(f'{c.id} | {c.phone} | {c.full_name} | active={c.active} | polizas={[\(p.policy_number, p.insurance_type, p.domain\) for p in c.policies]}'\) for c in db.query\(MockClient\).all\(\)]; db.close\(\)")
